title: Source Control Pull imports Data Table column name and table ID into raw DDL SQL without validation
description: SourceControlImportService.importDataTablesFromWorkFolder parses Data Table JSON files committed to the connected git repository and imports them on a Source Control Pull. The column upsert loop validates only column.type, then passes the attacker-controlled column.name and dataTable.id into DataTableDDLService operations (renameColumn, addColumn, createTableWithColumns). dataTable.id is interpolated directly into the physical table name via toTableName() (`${tablePrefix}data_table_user_${dataTableId}`) and embedded into raw ALTER/CREATE TABLE statements executed with em.query(), allowing SQL injection on the internal PostgreSQL instance when an administrator pulls a malicious file (CVSS 4.0 high).
